hero.tagline: Fullstack dev who builds what your business actually needs
hero.bio: I'm Leonardo, a fullstack developer based in Santo Domingo, DR. Two years building in the JS/TS ecosystem — from full operational systems for businesses to SaaS products with real users. I work remotely with agencies and international clients who'd rather ship fast than hold status meetings.
hero.eyebrow: Available for remote work — Santo Domingo, DR
about.title: Who I am
about.p1: I'm not the dev who sends a 40-minute Loom explaining why he picked a library. I'm the one shipping a working product while others are still setting up the boilerplate. Two years in, and every project I take on I treat as something real people will open, use, and judge — not a line item in my GitHub activity.
about.p2: My core stack is Next.js, Astro, and NestJS. That covers everything from a landing page that needs to load in two seconds to an internal system with roles, inventory, billing, and financial reports. I don't waste time evaluating 15 frameworks per project — I already know what works for each type of problem.
about.p3: Your business doesn't care whether I used Server Components or an elegant custom hook. What it needs is for the thing to work, to scale when it has to, and for the next dev who touches it not to quit on the spot. That's what I build.
about.p4: If you're an agency that needs a dev who hits the ground running without a full briefing, or a client who wants to move fast without ending up with a codebase nobody can maintain — we'll probably get along. Nearshore from DR, easy US timezone overlap.

services.title: What I do
services.sub: Code that solves real problems. No over-engineering, no shortcuts that come back to bite you.
services.web.title: WEB DEVELOPMENT
services.web.description: Your app can't afford to fall over the first day it gets real traffic. I build fullstack applications with React, Next.js, and Astro — with architecture that handles growth without forcing a full rewrite six months from now.
services.landing.title: LANDING PAGES
services.landing.description: A slow landing page is a landing page that doesn't convert. I build sites with Core Web Vitals green from day one, technical SEO solved at the root, and copy that doesn't get in the way. Delivered in 5–7 days.
services.software.title: CUSTOM SOFTWARE
services.software.description: Dashboards, management systems, POS, inventory control, billing. If your team still depends on spreadsheets or manual processes someone invented three years ago, I can build the replacement — and something people will actually want to use.
services.api.title: APIs & BACKEND
services.api.description: REST services with NestJS, PostgreSQL, MongoDB. Payment gateway integration, third-party APIs, and backend architecture. Everything documented, cleanly structured, and ready for another dev to understand without a two-hour onboarding call.
projects.title: Recent work
projects.sub: Real products, in production, with real users.
project.goldentouch.name: GOLDEN TOUCH
project.goldentouch.description: A North Carolina cleaning company needed a professional website to attract residential and commercial clients. I built a bilingual (EN/ES) Next.js site with a dynamic quote form, service showcase, before/after gallery, testimonial system, and SEO optimized for local search. Live product generating real leads.
project.tiksnap.name: TIKSNAP
project.tiksnap.description: A free open-source tool to download TikTok videos without watermarks — no ads, no shady popups, no signups. Built with Next.js SSR, privacy-focused and GDPR compliant. Used by thousands of people every month.
project.tonyranch.name: TONYRANCH
project.tonyranch.description: A resort was running reservations, day passes, inventory, and finances on paper and Excel. I built a full operational system: real-time bookings, point of sale, inventory control, and financial reports — all in an installable PWA. The spreadsheets are gone and nobody misses them.
project.skymods.name: THE SKY MODS
project.skymods.description: A global mobile game community needed a centralized place to distribute mods. I built the platform using the GitHub API for download management, real-time counters with MongoDB, and support for 4 languages (ES/EN/ID/JA). Thousands of active users across three continents.
project.bocati.name: BOCATI
project.bocati.description: A B2B restaurant management SaaS needed a landing page that explained the product without boring the prospect. I built it with Astro — instant load, an interactive ROI calculator, and a pricing comparison. Zero unnecessary JavaScript, zero friction.
project.melissa.name: MELISSA HAIRSTYLE
project.melissa.description: A licensed cosmetologist was selling her natural hair products in the US via WhatsApp screenshots and Excel sheets. I built her a full store with a product catalog, bilingual blog, and an admin panel where she manages everything without touching a line of code — the CMS was built from scratch. She went from chasing sales in chat to having a storefront that works on its own.
contact.note: You don't need everything figured out to reach out. If you have a deadline, a rough budget, or even just an idea you're still working through — send a message and we'll see if it makes sense to work together.
page.title: Leonardo Victoriano — Fullstack Developer from Dominican Republic
page.description: Fullstack developer from Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic. Specialized in Next.js, Astro, and NestJS. Landing pages, web apps, custom software, and APIs for agencies and international clients. Nearshore dev from DR.
